error_signature: Google Sheets only adds one row from multiple JSON objects
title: Google Sheets node only adds one row for multiple JSON objects
symptom: When trying to add multiple rows to Google Sheets from an array of JSON objects, only one row is added instead of multiple.
applies_when: Input is an array of JSON objects
not_this_if: Input is already in the correct format
Using a different node for Google Sheets
root_cause: The Google Sheets node processes each item individually. If the input is a single array, it treats it as one item, resulting in only one row being added. To add multiple rows, the array must be split into individual items.
fix_steps: Add a Split Out node before the Google Sheets node
Connect the Split Out node to the Google Sheets node
Configure the Split Out node to split the input array into individual items
agent_instruction: Use a Split Out node to split the input array into individual JSON objects before the Google Sheets node.
